functions.name: d
functions.signature: function d(strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]): YYYYMMDDWithMethods
functions.description: Tagged template literal for creating YYYYMMDD dates with fluent methods. Parses various date formats and returns a proxy object with chainable date operations.

returns.description: YYYYMMDD date with fluent methods for comparisons, arithmetic, and formatting

examples.title: Basic usage
Fluent operations

functions.name: p
functions.signature: function p(strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]): Period
functions.description: Tagged template literal for creating Period values (YYYYMM format). Automatically converts Date objects to periods.

returns.description: Period value as a branded number

examples.title: Create periods

functions.name: isYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function isYYYYMMDD(value: string): value is YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Type guard to check if a string is in valid YYYYMMDD format. Validates date ranges including leap years.

examples.title: Validation

functions.name: createYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function createYYYYMMDD(value: string): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Create a YYYYMMDD from a string with validation. Throws an error if the input is not a valid date.
functions.throws: Error if value is not valid YYYYMMDD format

examples.title: Create with validation

functions.name: tryCreateYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function tryCreateYYYYMMDD(value: string): YYYYMMDD | null
functions.description: Safely create a YYYYMMDD from a string. Returns null if invalid instead of throwing.

returns.description: Valid YYYYMMDD or null if invalid

examples.title: Safe creation

functions.name: parseToYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function parseToYYYYMMDD(value: string | Date | YYYYMMDD): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Parse various date formats to YYYYMMDD. Supports ISO dates, slash format, Date objects, and existing YYYYMMDD strings.
functions.throws: Error if value cannot be parsed as a date

examples.title: Parse various formats
examples.code:
const d1 = parseToYYYYMMDD('20250115');      // Already YYYYMMDD
const d2 = parseToYYYYMMDD('2025-01-15');    // ISO format
const d3 = parseToYYYYMMDD('2025/01/15');    // Slash format
const d4 = parseToYYYYMMDD(new Date());      // Date object

functions.name: dateToYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function dateToYYYYMMDD(date: Date): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Convert a JavaScript Date object to YYYYMMDD format.

examples.title: Convert Date object
examples.code:
const today = dateToYYYYMMDD(new Date());
console.log(today); // e.g., '20250115'

functions.name: yyyymmddToDate
functions.signature: function yyyymmddToDate(value: YYYYMMDD): Date
functions.description: Convert YYYYMMDD to a JavaScript Date object.

examples.title: Convert to Date
examples.code:
const date = yyyymmddToDate('20250115' as YYYYMMDD);
console.log(date.toISOString());

functions.name: formatYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function formatYYYYMMDD(value: YYYYMMDD, separator?: string): string
functions.description: Format YYYYMMDD to a display string with customizable separator.

examples.title: Format dates
examples.code:
formatYYYYMMDD('20250115' as YYYYMMDD);      // '2025-01-15'
formatYYYYMMDD('20250115' as YYYYMMDD, '/'); // '2025/01/15'
formatYYYYMMDD('20250115' as YYYYMMDD, '.'); // '2025.01.15'

functions.name: todayYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function todayYYYYMMDD(): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Get today's date as YYYYMMDD.

examples.title: Get today
examples.code:
const today = todayYYYYMMDD();
console.log(`Today is ${formatYYYYMMDD(today)}`);

functions.name: addDaysToYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function addDaysToYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD, days: number): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Add or subtract days from a YYYYMMDD date.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to add (negative to subtract)

examples.title: Date arithmetic

functions.name: addMonthsToYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function addMonthsToYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD, months: number): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Add or subtract months from a YYYYMMDD date. Handles month-end edge cases intelligently.

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of months to add (negative to subtract)

examples.title: Month arithmetic

functions.name: daysBetweenYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function daysBetweenYYYYMMDD(from: YYYYMMDD, to: YYYYMMDD): number
functions.description: Calculate the number of days between two YYYYMMDD dates.

returns.description: Number of days between dates (negative if to is before from)

examples.title: Calculate days

functions.name: compareYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function compareYYYYMMDD(a: YYYYMMDD, b: YYYYMMDD): number
functions.description: Compare two YYYYMMDD dates. Returns negative if a < b, positive if a > b, zero if equal.

functions.name: isBeforeYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function isBeforeYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD, compare: YYYYMMDD): boolean
functions.description: Check if a YYYYMMDD date is before another.

returns.description: True if date is before compare

examples.title: Date comparison

functions.name: isAfterYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function isAfterYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD, compare: YYYYMMDD): boolean
functions.description: Check if a YYYYMMDD date is after another.

returns.description: True if date is after compare

examples.title: Date comparison

functions.name: startOfMonthYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function startOfMonthYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Get the first day of the month for a given date.

examples.title: Month boundaries
examples.code:
const date = createYYYYMMDD('20250115');
const start = startOfMonthYYYYMMDD(date); // '20250101'

functions.name: endOfMonthYYYYMMDD
functions.signature: function endOfMonthYYYYMMDD(date: YYYYMMDD): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Get the last day of the month for a given date.

examples.title: Month boundaries
examples.code:
const date = createYYYYMMDD('20250215');
const end = endOfMonthYYYYMMDD(date); // '20250228'

functions.name: isPeriod
functions.signature: function isPeriod(value: number): value is Period
functions.description: Type guard to check if a number is a valid Period (YYYYMM format).

examples.title: Validate period

functions.name: createPeriod
functions.signature: function createPeriod(value: number): Period
functions.description: Create a Period from a number with validation. Throws if invalid.
functions.throws: Error if value is not valid Period format

examples.title: Create period
examples.code:
const period = createPeriod(202501);
console.log(`Period: ${period}`);

functions.name: periodFromYearMonth
functions.signature: function periodFromYearMonth(year: number, month: number): Period
functions.description: Create a Period from year and month components.

examples.title: Create from components
examples.code: const period = periodFromYearMonth(2025, 1); // 202501

functions.name: currentPeriod
functions.signature: function currentPeriod(): Period
functions.description: Get the current period based on today's date.

examples.title: Get current period
examples.code:
const period = currentPeriod();
console.log(`Current period: ${period}`);

functions.name: periodYear
functions.signature: function periodYear(period: Period): number
functions.description: Extract the year component from a Period.

examples.title: Extract year
examples.code: const year = periodYear(202501); // 2025

functions.name: periodMonth
functions.signature: function periodMonth(period: Period): number
functions.description: Extract the month component from a Period.

examples.title: Extract month
examples.code: const month = periodMonth(202501); // 1

functions.name: periodToDate
functions.signature: function periodToDate(period: Period): Date
functions.description: Convert a Period to a Date object (first day of month).

returns.description: Date object for first day of period

examples.title: Convert to Date
examples.code:
const date = periodToDate(202501);
console.log(date); // 2025-01-01

functions.name: dateToPeriod
functions.signature: function dateToPeriod(date: Date): Period
functions.description: Convert a Date object to a Period.

examples.title: Date to period
examples.code:
const period = dateToPeriod(new Date('2025-01-15'));
console.log(period); // 202501

functions.name: yyyymmddToPeriod
functions.signature: function yyyymmddToPeriod(date: YYYYMMDD): Period
functions.description: Convert a YYYYMMDD date to a Period.

examples.title: Date to period
examples.code:
const period = yyyymmddToPeriod('20250115' as YYYYMMDD);
console.log(period); // 202501

functions.name: periodStartDate
functions.signature: function periodStartDate(period: Period): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Get the first day of a period as YYYYMMDD.

examples.title: Period start date
examples.code: const start = periodStartDate(202501); // '20250101'

functions.name: periodEndDate
functions.signature: function periodEndDate(period: Period): YYYYMMDD
functions.description: Get the last day of a period as YYYYMMDD.

examples.title: Period end date
examples.code: const end = periodEndDate(202501); // '20250131'

functions.name: addMonthsToPeriod
functions.signature: function addMonthsToPeriod(period: Period, months: number): Period
functions.description: Add or subtract months from a Period.

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of months to add (negative to subtract)

examples.title: Period arithmetic
examples.code:
const next = addMonthsToPeriod(202501, 1);  // 202502
const prev = addMonthsToPeriod(202501, -1); // 202412

functions.name: monthsBetweenPeriods
functions.signature: function monthsBetweenPeriods(from: Period, to: Period): number
functions.description: Calculate the number of months between two periods.

examples.title: Calculate months
examples.code: const months = monthsBetweenPeriods(202501, 202512); // 11

functions.name: formatPeriod
functions.signature: function formatPeriod(period: Period, separator?: string): string
functions.description: Format a Period for display with customizable separator.

functions.name: periodRange
functions.signature: function periodRange(from: Period, to: Period): Period[]
functions.description: Generate an array of periods between two periods (inclusive).

returns.description: Array of periods from start to end

functions.name: parseMoneyWorksJSON
functions.signature: function parseMoneyWorksJSON<T = JsonObject>(text: string, options?: MoneyWorksParseOptions): T
functions.description: Parse JSON with automatic MoneyWorks type conversion. Converts date fields to YYYYMMDD, period fields to Period, and time fields to HHMMSS.

examples.title: Parse with conversion

functions.name: parseDateJSON
functions.signature: function parseDateJSON<T = JsonObject>(text: string): T
functions.description: Parse JSON with automatic date conversion only (no periods or times).

examples.title: Date-only parsing

functions.name: createTypedParser
functions.signature: function createTypedParser<T>(dateFields: (keyof T)[], periodFields?: (keyof T)[], timeFields?: (keyof T)[]): (text: string) => T
functions.description: Create a typed parser for specific MoneyWorks types with custom field mappings.

returns.description: Parser function for the specified type

examples.title: Custom parser

functions.name: parseMoneyWorksResponse
functions.signature: async function parseMoneyWorksResponse<T = JsonObject>(response: Response, options?: MoneyWorksParseOptions): Promise<T>
functions.description: Parse a Response object with MoneyWorks type conversion.

returns.description: Parsed response data with converted types

examples.title: Parse API response
examples.code:
const response = await fetch('/api/transactions');
const data = await parseMoneyWorksResponse<Transaction[]>(response);

functions.name: createMoneyWorksReviver
functions.signature: function createMoneyWorksReviver(options?: MoneyWorksParseOptions): (key: string, value: JsonValue) => JsonValue
functions.description: Create a JSON reviver function for MoneyWorks types. Used internally by parseMoneyWorksJSON.

examples.title: Custom reviver

functions.name: stringifyMoneyWorks
functions.signature: function stringifyMoneyWorks(value: JsonValue, options?: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions): string
functions.description: Stringify JSON with MoneyWorks formatting options.

examples.title: Custom formatting

functions.name: stringifyForAPI
functions.signature: function stringifyForAPI(value: JsonValue): string
functions.description: Stringify for MoneyWorks API with no formatting (compact).

examples.title: API format

functions.name: stringifyForDisplay
functions.signature: function stringifyForDisplay(value: JsonValue): string
functions.description: Stringify for display with formatted dates and pretty printing.

examples.title: Display format

functions.name: createMoneyWorksReplacer
functions.signature: function createMoneyWorksReplacer(options?: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions): (key: string, value: JsonValue) => JsonValue
functions.description: Create a JSON replacer function for MoneyWorks types. Used internally by stringifyMoneyWorks.

examples.title: Custom replacer

functions.name: createStringifier
functions.signature: function createStringifier(defaultOptions: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions): (value: JsonValue, overrides?: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions) => string
functions.description: Create a custom stringifier with preset options.

examples.title: Custom stringifier

functions.name: safeStringify
functions.signature: function safeStringify(value: JsonValue, options?: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions): string
functions.description: Stringify with circular reference handling.

returns.description: JSON string with circular references replaced

examples.title: Safe stringify

namespaces.name: YYYYMMDDUtils
namespaces.description: Namespace providing all YYYYMMDD date functions for convenient access

examples.title: Using the namespace

namespaces.name: PeriodUtils
namespaces.description: Namespace providing all Period functions for convenient access
